column2: # Keep only numeric device columns (devices) and drop very sparse ones
# Axis range & ticks (adjust if you want)
# One panel builder (axis titles shown on **every** panel)
coord_fixed(xlim = c(axis_min, axis_max), ylim = c(axis_min, axis_max)) +
# Build all panels (every panel shows its own axis titles with "Device <id>")
plots[[idx]] <- make_panel(df_pair, x_lab_txt = x_id, y_lab_txt = y_id)
matrix_plot <- grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = n_dev, nrow = n_dev)
